Fable 5 Access Suspended — ork surface map

Anthropic suspended claude-fable-5 / Mythos 5 access for all customers per a US export-control directive (announced 2026-06-12). This PR's scope: fix what actively misdirects users NOW; keep reversible scaffolding dormant; defer the cascade-y structural removal. Filter below.

✅ Note: CC 2.1.176 already falls auto-mode back to the best Opus when Fable is unreachable — so no ork user breaks at runtime. ork's only job is to stop pointing at a dead model.
